# PERF-231 negative: PEM parsed once at package init
lang: go
file: PERF-231-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "encoding/pem"

var cachedBlock *pem.Block

func init() {
	// In real code: load from file/env once.
	cachedBlock, _ = pem.Decode([]byte("-----BEGIN PRIVATE KEY-----\nMIIE\n-----END PRIVATE KEY-----"))
}

func SignPDF(doc []byte, _ []byte) []byte {
	_ = cachedBlock
	return doc
}
